subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer – Python – Public sector
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Förvaltningsdata AB (public sector) is looking for a lead Backend Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 1125 SEK/h

Required tech:
• Python
• AWS
• Kubernetes

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
